name: When the Ground Shifts - Trusting the Process
summary: Show notes for January 16 broadcast. Theme: resilience in seasons of change. Scripture: Isaiah 43:2.

name: Carrying Each Other's Burdens
summary: Show notes for January 10 broadcast. Community grief and compassion. Guest: Rev. Angela Dawson.

name: Draft - Honoring the Fathers of Faith Reflection
summary: Working draft for January 17 broadcast. Fatherhood, absence, and grace. Still editing.

name: Joy Is a Practice, Not a Destination
summary: January 3 episode. Listener call-in on cultivating joy in hard seasons. Psalm 30:5.

name: Honoring the Women of Faith Special
summary: Honoring the Women of Faith broadcast. Tributes, scripture, and stories of maternal faith from Memphis listeners.

name: The Table Is Set - A Word of Remembrance for Those We Carry
summary: January 3 broadcast. Remembrance, loss, and hope. Pre-recorded while Rebecca visited Elmwood Cemetery.

name: Listening as an Act of Love
summary: December 27 episode. The ministry of presence. How to show up for someone who is suffering.

name: New Year Sunrise - Light in the Darkness
summary: New Year special, January 3. Live from Grace Community Church sunrise service. Rebecca delivers meditation.

name: Rev. Angela Dawson
summary: Chaplain at Golden Heart Medical Center. Frequent guest discussing grief ministry and hospital chaplaincy.

name: Pastor William Greer
summary: Senior pastor, Grace Community Church, Memphis. Mentor to Rebecca. Occasional guest on faith and leadership.

name: Deacon Charles Mosley
summary: Head deacon, Grace Community Church. Leads the annual community church health fair and congregational care programs.

name: Covenant Insurance Group
summary: Presenting sponsor of Morning Reflections with Rebecca. Life and health insurance solutions for Memphis families.

name: Mitchell's Flowers
summary: Local Memphis florist. Sponsor for special-occasion and holiday broadcasts.

name: Bluff City Auto Care
summary: Trusted Memphis auto repair. Saturday morning sponsor. Reliable service for the whole family.

name: The Door Is Already Open
summary: A morning reflection on grace and access. God's welcome is not contingent on our readiness. Revelation 3:20.

name: Forty Years in the Wilderness - and Still
summary: Devotional for those in a long season of waiting. Numbers 14. Hope is not naivety; it is obedience.

name: Sabbath Is Not a Reward
summary: Rest is commanded, not earned. A word for caregivers, helpers, and the chronically busy. Genesis 2:3.

name: Morning Reflections Ep. 382 - January 16, 2026
summary: When the Ground Shifts. Season of change. Audio and transcript available. WGSP 1490 AM.

name: Morning Reflections Ep. 381 - January 10, 2026
summary: Carrying Each Other's Burdens. Guest: Rev. Angela Dawson. Audio available. WGSP 1490 AM.

name: Morning Reflections Ep. 380 - January 3, 2026
summary: Joy Is a Practice. Listener call-in special. Audio and transcript available. WGSP 1490 AM.

name: Morning Reflections Ep. 374 - December 13, 2025
summary: Advent reflection on new beginnings. Audio available. WGSP 1490 AM.

name: The Art of Helping by Henri Nouwen
summary: Essential reading for chaplains and caregivers. Nouwen's insight on wounded healers is foundational.

name: Jesus and the Disinherited by Howard Thurman
summary: The book that shaped Martin Luther King Jr. and shaped Rebecca. Required reading for pastoral care in Memphis.

name: Daring Greatly by Brené Brown
summary: Vulnerability and courage. Recommended for anyone doing hard relational work, including chaplains.

name: Unsheltered by Barbara Kingsolver
summary: Fiction pick. Two families, two centuries, one house about to fall. Kingsolver at her most prophetic.
